title: Re-engage dormant LinkAja users with tiered cashback
behavioralSignal: No payment in 14d + prior active LinkAja usage
rationale: Behavioral data shows 68% of at-risk users respond to cashback within 72h of push. LinkAja cohort has highest churn velocity.

title: DeFi cross-sell to power users browsing yield pools
behavioralSignal: dapp_browse Aave/Uniswap 2+ times + active payment wallet
rationale: Power users with DeFi browse behavior convert at 18.4% on bundled offers vs 6.2% on generic promos.

title: ShopeePay viral loop for casual ecommerce browsers
behavioralSignal: Ecommerce app opens 3x/week without ShopeePay txn
rationale: Casual segment shows high promo_click rate (24%) but low conversion. Referral incentive closes the gap.

title: Win-back campaign for reactivation targets via preferred channel
rationale: Profile data shows 72% of reactivation targets prefer SMS. Current email-only outreach underperforms by 3.2x.

title: Premium upsell for high-LTV casual payers
behavioralSignal: Monthly spend > 1M IDR + weekly payment pattern
rationale: Behavioral scoring identifies casual users with premium spending patterns. In-app upsell converts at 8.1%.

title: Browser-to-buyer nudge for dapp-only explorers
rationale: Browsers have high app_open frequency but low payment events. First-txn incentive reduces drop-off at consideration stage.
